## Change Tier

<!-- Select one. If unsure, start with Standard — any maintainer can escalate. -->

- [ ] **Standard** — new content, fixes, or improvements
- [ ] **Significant** — governance, structural, or directional change (requires prior discussion issue labelled `significant-decision` open for ≥10 business days)

## Working Group

<!-- Delete those that don't apply. -->

- [ ] Outreach
- [ ] Inclusive Engineering
- [ ] DE Role Definition
- [ ] Cross‑cutting / general

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
- [ ] Content is vendor‑ and org‑agnostic
- [ ] Images have alt text; new files follow naming conventions

<!-- For significant changes only: -->
- [ ] A discussion issue labelled `significant-decision` was open for ≥10 business days before this PR
- [ ] Decision record is included in this PR or the linked issue
